import React from 'react' import PropTypes from "prop-types" import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' // import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' export default function Navbar({ title, about, mode, changeMode,Custombtn,Textform }) { return (
{title}
  • {Textform}
  • {about}
  • {Custombtn}
) } Navbar.propTypes = { title: PropTypes.string.isRequired, about: PropTypes.string, mode: PropTypes.object, changeMode: PropTypes.func } Navbar.defaultProps = { title: "TextUtils", about: "About" }
